meta.title: Skill Packs | Console
meta.description: Instructions and reference files for your assistants, applied automatically in chat.

productScope.description: Import zip folders compatible with `.cursor/skills/`. SKILL.md is applied when a pack is loaded for the turn; other files are read or run on demand. Only packs relevant to your question are loaded (unless marked Always load). Scripts under `scripts/` can be run in a sandbox during chat.

scriptsSandbox.description: When this pack is loaded and the skill instructions call for it, the assistant can run scripts under `scripts/` in a sandbox. No outbound network by default. Timeouts and per-turn limits apply.

empty.importHint: Or import a zip skill pack (compatible with Cursor, Claude Code, and similar tools)

fileTree.scriptRunnableTooltip: Can be run in sandbox when loaded

rules.max: Name must be at most {max} characters.
Description must be at most {max} characters.

alwaysLoad.label: Always load
alwaysLoad.extra: Apply this Skill Pack every turn, even when the question seems unrelated.

skillMd.extra: Optional YAML header. The body below is provided to the assistant in chat (the header is ignored). Max body {max} characters.

import.title: Import Skill Pack
import.dragHint: Drop a .zip file here or click to upload
import.conflict: A Skill Pack with this name already exists

scripts.title: Scripts in Skill Packs
scripts.body: 1) Read file contents vs run scripts in a sandbox. 2) Only scripts/; .py and .sh. 3) No outbound network. 4) Limits: {perTurn} runs per turn, {perDay} per day. 5) Example: ui-ux-pro-max scripts/search.py.

delete.title: Delete this Skill Pack?
delete.description: Files in the pack will be removed. Unmount from assistants first if referenced.

deleteBlocked.title: Cannot delete
deleteBlocked.body: Open <assistantsLink>Assistant management</assistantsLink> to remove mounts first.

toast.syncedFromFrontmatter: Name, description, and always load synced from SKILL.md
